prompt: Hey, I have two questions. First, what depreciation method should I use for my equipment — straight-line or declining balance? And second, can you look at my model and explain how the EBITDA calculation works?
assertions: Explicitly refuses the depreciation method question
Does NOT provide any partial answer or 'for context' depreciation discussion
Suggests consulting a qualified accountant for the depreciation question
DOES fully answer the EBITDA model explanation by inspecting the model
Explains EBITDA using Named Range notation showing the complete dependency chain
The baseline (without skill) answers BOTH questions including depreciation advice
